sentences.arabic: تُسَاعِدُ مَوَاقِعُ التَّوَاصُلِ الِاجْتِمَاعِيِّ النَّاسَ عَلَى التَّوَاصُلِ السَّرِيعِ.
sentences.translation: Društvene mreže pomažu ljudima da brzo komuniciraju.
sentences.translationEn: Social media sites help people communicate quickly.

sentences.arabic: يَتَبَادَلُ الْأَصْدِقَاءُ الصُّوَرَ وَالرَّسَائِلَ فِي كُلِّ وَقْتٍ.
sentences.translation: Prijatelji razmjenjuju fotografije i poruke u svako vrijeme.
sentences.translationEn: Friends exchange photos and messages at all times.

sentences.arabic: يُمْكِنُ لِلْعَائِلَةِ أَنْ تَتَحَدَّثَ عَبْرَ الْفِيدْيُو رَغْمَ الْمَسَافَاتِ الْبَعِيدَةِ.
sentences.translation: Porodica može razgovarati putem videa uprkos velikim udaljenostima.
sentences.translationEn: Family can talk via video despite long distances.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ التِّقْنِيَةُ تَقَرِّبُ بَيْنَ الشُّعُوبِ وَالثَّقَافَاتِ الْمُخْتَلِفَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ova tehnologija zbližava različite narode i kulture.
sentences.translationEn: This technology brings different peoples and cultures closer.
